seoTitle: How to Create a Survey With Canva Easily in 2026
metaDescription: Learn how to build a branded survey in Canva, from picking a template to customizing it, so you can collect customer feedback without a separate survey tool.
intro: Canva isn't just for social graphics — it can also be used to design surveys that look like an extension of your brand rather than a generic form. This guide covers how to navigate Canva's interface for survey creation, pick and customize a template, and get your finished survey ready to share. It's aimed at anyone who wants better-looking feedback forms without learning new software.

steps.heading: Open Canva and find survey templates
steps.body: Start from Canva's interface and search for survey layouts rather than starting from a blank page, so you have a structure to build on.

steps.heading: Choose a template that fits your purpose
steps.body: Select a template suited to what you're gathering feedback on, whether that's customer satisfaction, market research, or event feedback.

steps.heading: Customize the design and questions
steps.body: Adjust colors, fonts, and layout to match your branding, then edit the question text so the survey reflects what you actually want to ask.

steps.heading: Prepare your survey for distribution
steps.body: Once the design is finished, get it ready to share by email, social media, or embedding it on your website.

faq.question: Can I use Canva surveys for customer feedback?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva surveys work well for gathering customer satisfaction feedback or market research, especially when you want the form to match your brand's look.

faq.question: Do I need design experience to make a survey in Canva?
faq.answer: No, Canva's templates are built for beginners, so you can start from an existing layout and adjust it rather than designing from scratch.

faq.question: Can I share a Canva survey on multiple platforms?
faq.answer: Yes, once your survey is designed you can distribute it through email, social media, or by embedding it on a website.

faq.question: Is Canva good for both beginners and professionals making surveys?
faq.answer: Yes, the template-based workflow is simple enough for first-time users while still offering enough customization for professionals refining their branding.
